_atlas_layout_note: atlas tilemap_packed.png is a grid of 16x16 tiles; tile (col, row) → individual file Tiles/tile_NNNN.png where NNNN = row*12 + col

_usage_notes.village_scene: use tiny_town: floor_grass + path + 4 differently-colored houses for Mira/Theo/Rell/Lina + tree decorations + fence around village
_usage_notes.dream_tutorial: use tiny_dungeon: floor_dark + wall_brick + door for opening, plus our custom lamp_off/lamp_on + paper_clue items
_usage_notes.dream_mira: use tiny_dungeon mirrors (custom) on tiny_dungeon walls
_usage_notes.general: atlas can be loaded as TileSet in Godot (tile_size=16). Individual PNGs work well as Sprite2D textures.
